memory.summary: The lounge is packed and the outlets are gone, so my usual easy setup isn’t available. At the same time, I got a casual invite to eat together, which makes the afternoon feel a bit more social than I expected.
아, 이미 먼저 주문해둔 상태구나. 분위기가 좀 더 즉흥적으로 굴러가고 있고, 나는 지금 합류만 하면 되는 상황처럼 보인다.
아직 새로 들어온 정보는 없고, 상황 인식도 크게 달라지지 않았다. 다만 지금은 에너지와 스트레스가 조금 나아져서, 덜 버거운 상태로 보인다.
My focus is slipping as the workout window gets close, so the afternoon feels more fragmented now. I’m still a bit more functional than earlier, but the momentum is clearly fading.
새 정보는 없고, 상황은 그대로다. 그래도 지금은 전보다 덜 지치고 덜 긴장한 상태라서, 전반적으로 조금은 버틸 만하게 느껴진다.
새 정보는 없고, 전체 상황도 크게 달라지지 않았다. 다만 지금은 전보다 스트레스가 낮아서, 생각보다 덜 버겁게 느껴진다.
새 정보는 없고, 지금 상태는 예전보다 덜 지치고 덜 긴장해 보인다. 그래도 집중은 완전히 안정된 건 아니라서, 아직은 살짝 흔들리는 느낌이다.
새 정보는 없고, 상황도 그대로다. 다만 지금은 전보다 덜 지치고 덜 불안해서, 전체적으로는 조금 더 안정적으로 느껴진다.
새 정보는 없고, 상황도 그대로다. 지금은 스트레스가 꽤 내려가서 이전보다 훨씬 덜 버겁게 느껴진다.
새 정보는 없고, 상태도 그대로다. 예전보다 덜 지치고 덜 긴장해서 전반적으로는 안정적인 편이지만, 완전히 편안한 건 아니다.

desires: not let the overdue language study keep hanging over me and make me feel behind
avoid looking flaky or like I can’t follow through, especially if anyone notices my delays
get something filling to eat soon so I don’t crash later
preserve the calmer, less-stressed feeling I have right now instead of pushing myself into another spiral

goals.description: Set a clean stopping point for the language study and treat it as contained progress, not a personal failure.
goals.rationale: It’s still hanging over me, and I want the mental load of it to stop without turning it into a spiral or pretending I need to force a full grind.

goals.description: Get something filling to eat soon, with the lowest-friction option available.
goals.rationale: I’m already the kind of tired where a crash makes everything worse, so basic fuel matters more than being picky.

goals.description: Do the light workout only in a minimal, low-stress way if there’s still enough bandwidth after the first two goals.
goals.rationale: I want to keep the habit alive, but it’s lower priority than stopping the study cleanly and eating before I get more depleted.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 by setting a clean stop instead of letting it linger. I’m ignoring the sunk-cost panic. Side effect: this may delay food a bit, but I’d rather contain the study loop first than keep mentally carrying it.

goals.description: Finish the language study block in a workable spot even without my usual setup, and keep moving so I don’t end up catching up later.

goals.description: Protect enough energy to still get through the workout and the rest of the afternoon without crashing.
goals.rationale: I’m already running tired, so if I burn out early I lose the whole afternoon, not just this task.

goals.description: Acknowledge the social invite and keep it on my radar so I don’t accidentally look absent or get left out.
goals.rationale: It matters a bit, but I can’t let it pull me off track when the language work is more urgent.
